name: Cinnamon Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 2 cups of sugar and 3 cups of water into a saucepan.
2. Add the lemon slices and cinnamon stick to the mixture.
3. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches boiling point.
4. Reduce the heat to maintain a gentle simmer, ensuring the syrup remains thin.
5. Allow the syrup to cool slightly before using or storing.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
